name: Matisse Collage
tagline: Artful paper-cut deck with cream canvas, organic cutouts, gallery spacing, and calm color-block composition.

palette.description: Warm cream canvas with Matisse-inspired blue, red, yellow, pink, green, and black cut-paper shapes.

typography.style: Elegant blue serif display type with restrained sans body, matching the source art-school tone.

best_for: Portfolio, art education, creative direction, brand manifesto, and workshop decks that should feel artful, gentle, and handmade.
avoid_for: Dense financial reports, dark technical dashboards, or high-pressure sales decks where the organic art language would feel too soft.

source_inspiration.name: SlidesCarnival Matisse Art Style
source_inspiration.notes: Independent page-by-page HTML/CSS reconstruction of the public preview sequence: cream canvas, blue serif titles, organic cutouts, botanical forms, dancer silhouettes, pink/yellow blocks, and centered gallery spacing. It does not reuse source slide assets.
